channel.title: instruction following agent on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in instruction following agent on Sukai Huang

item.title: Theodore_r_sumers How to Talk So Ai Will Learn 2022
item.description: [TOC] Title: How to talk so AI will learn: Instructions, descriptions, and autonomy Author: Theodore R. Sumers et. al. Publish Year: NeurIPS 2022 Review Date: Wed, Mar 15, 2023 url: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2206.07870.pdf Summary of paper Motivation yet today, we lack computational models explaining such language use Contribution To address this challenge, we formalise learning from language in a contextual bandit setting and ask how a human might communicate preferences over behaviours.
